content.stem: Look at this 2x2 grid pattern. Top row: Star, Heart. Bottom row: Star, ___. If each row has the same pattern and each column has the same pattern, what goes in the missing space?
content.explanation: The top row shows Star, Heart. For the pattern to be the same, the bottom row must also be Star, Heart. Also, the right column would be Heart, Heart, which is consistent.

metadata.cognitive_skill: Simultaneous row and column pattern analysis

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Student only looks at left column pattern (Star, Star) and ignores row pattern
Student thinks pattern requires introducing a new shape
Student assumes shapes must alternate without checking constraints
